mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARCHIVE WHERE REPO_ID = #{repoId}
AND (ARCHIVE_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ARCHIVE_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT a.*, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS writerName, d.DEPT_NAME AS writerDeptName FROM ARCHIVE a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.WRITER_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID WHERE a.ARCHIVE_ID = #{archiveId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARCHIVE (REPO_ID, WRITER_ID, ARCHIVE_TITLE, ARCHIVE_CONTENT) VALUES (#{repoId}, #{writerId}, #{archiveTitle}, #{archiveContent})
mapper.update: UPDATE ARCHIVE SET ARCHIVE_TITLE = #{archiveTitle}, ARCHIVE_CONTENT = #{archiveContent}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ARCHIVE_ID = #{archiveId}
